bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has launched an 'Eco-Friendly Cafeteria' initiative to promote sustainable choices among its community members. This effort aims to encourage environmentally conscious practices on campus.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has been honored with a joint doctoral scholarship, a prestigious award shared between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law alumni association’s new executive committee takes charge for 2026–2028 term
bracu_official.summary: The BRAC University law alumni association has inaugurated its new executive committee, which will serve for the 2026–2028 term.
